tasks.description: Scan all Python files for security vulnerabilities
Scan all Python files for security vulnerabilities

brief.goal: Scan all Python files in the cohort project for security vulnerabilities
brief.approach: Run bandit static analysis + targeted grep patterns for common vulnerability classes (injection, hardcoded secrets, insecure deserialization, shell commands, weak crypto)
brief.acceptance: Security report produced with findings categorized by severity; 0 unaddressed HIGH-severity issues
brief.tool: bandit (static security analyzer) + grep-based pattern scanning
brief.outcome: Security scan report with per-file findings, severity levels, line numbers, and remediation guidance

action.tool: bandit (static security analyzer) + grep-based pattern scanning

outcome.success_criteria: Security report produced with findings categorized by severity; 0 unaddressed HIGH-severity issues

consultations.relationship: Security reviewer for all code changes
consultations.protocol: Flag security-sensitive code (auth, crypto, subprocess, file I/O) for security_agent review before merge.
consultations.reason: Security review required for code changes
